entities.name: PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Finite and vulnerable resources essential for crop improvement and food security

entities.name: CROP CULTIVARS
entities.description: New varieties of crops introduced in agriculture that can lead to the loss of plant genetic resources

entities.name: URBANIZATION
entities.description: The process of making an area more urban, contributing to the loss of plant genetic resources

entities.name: NATURAL HAZARDS
entities.description: Natural events that can cause the loss of plant genetic resources

entities.name: CONVENTION ON BIOLOGICAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: An international treaty drafted to address the vulnerability and conservation of biological diversity

entities.name: EARTH SUMMIT
entities.description: The 1992 summit in Rio where the Convention on Biological Diversity was drafted

entities.name: RIO
entities.description: The city in Brazil where the Earth Summit took place

entities.name: MILLENNIUM DEVELOPMENT GOALS
entities.description: Global targets including food security and poverty alleviation that PGR help achieve

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: POVERTY ALLEVIATION
entities.description: The act of reducing the number of people living in poverty

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION
entities.description: The practice of protecting the natural environment

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Development that meets the needs of the present without compromising future generations

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: Efforts aimed at increasing food security and productivity using plant genetic resources

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, which crop improvement efforts aim to increase

entities.name: GENEBANKS
entities.description: Facilities established to conserve plant genetic resources and accessions

entities.name: ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Individual samples of plant genetic resources conserved in genebanks
